form.formComment: Last start 6th (Sr2) over 1980m at Tamworth was 7th-9.37 at the bell, beaten 14 m by Grosestar (2:28.00) in NR up to 45 on March 12 at $31. At the start before 9th (Sr4) over 1609m at Tamworth, at the bell was 8th-13.12 beaten 19 m by Otis Rising (1:56.50) in NR 41 to 47 on March 5 at $61. Anticipate a far better run this time.

form.formComment: Last start was driven from back in the field when 7th (Fr4) over 1760m at this track beaten 19 m by Bellrivergirl (2:10.50) in NR up to 35 on April 5 at $7. Two runs back 3rd (Sr3) over 1609m at Tamworth beaten 23 m by Jeremy Lou (1:58.30) in NR up to 34 on March 26 at $5.50. Others make more appeal.

form.formComment: Last start was well back in the run when 4th (Fr6) over 1760m at this track, beaten 4.5 m by Gotonebettor (2:09.40) in NR 41 to 45 on April 5 at $11. This looks a suitable assignment.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked in the home straight on the final occasion when Girlsgotcurls galloped.

form.formComment: Two back was beaten by 9 m finishing third behind Whiskey Royale at Tamworth over 1609m in a NR 39 to 44 on March 26 at $8. Then a handy effort when beaten by 4 m finishing third after being driven well back, behind Gotonebettor at this track over 1760m in a NR 41 to 45 on April 5 at $11. Among the contenders.

form.formComment: Last start 4th (Fr1) over 1760m after showing early pace at this track, beaten 8 m by Seven Rippin Aces (2:10.70) in NR 36 to 40 on April 5 at $2.90. At the start before solid effort when 3rd (Fr3) over 1609m after showing early speed at Tamworth was 3rd-4.34 at the bell, beaten 11 m by Double Lines (1:58.60) in NR 35 to 38 on March 26 at $2.50. Solid top-three prospects.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Galloped away when the start was affected.
Worked forward at the start to lead the event around the 1300m.

form.formComment: Not far away at the last couple starts; Finished 3.5 m third behind Seven Rippin Aces at this track over 1760m NR 36 to 40 last start. Before that was beaten 4 metres second at Tamworth over 1609m in NR 35 to 38 on March 26. Racing well and should be in the finish again.

form.formComment: Last start by 1.5 m (Fr3) at this track (2:10.70) beating Johnny Dee in NR 36 to 40 on April 5 at $5.50. Has the ability to take this out.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Galloped after the start, checking You Cannot Hide.
Broke stride free of any external factors passing the 1400m.

form.formComment: Capable of better than we have seen lately. Last start 6th (Sr1) over 1760m at this track, beaten 15 m by Gotonebettor (2:09.40) in NR 41 to 45 on April 5 at $2.90. The run previous was well back in the run when 5th (Fr3) over 1609m after racing wide at Tamworth, at the bell was 5th-18.27 beaten 12 m by Lachies Ideal (1:57.10) in NR 45 to 48 on March 26 at $4. Expecting a much better run this time.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Held up for some distance in the early part of the home straight.

form.formComment: Last start was well beaten into eighth after showing early speed, behind Cut Glass at this track over 2160m in a NR 45 to 55 on April 5 at $5. Raced better the start before that with a solid effort when 2nd (Sr1) over 1609m at Tamworth was 2nd-4.11 at the bell, beaten 9 m by Whiskey Royale (1:57.50) in NR 39 to 44 on March 26 at $6. Better run anticipated this time.
